title: Palliative and end of life care profiles: July 2025 update
body: " The update for July 2025 has been published by the Office for Health Improvement and Disparities (OHID).  This update includes:   place of death factsheets care home factsheets   The palliative and end of life care profiles are presented in an interactive tool which aims to help local government and health services improve care at the end of life.  "
